title: hieracium angustisquamum
intro: Hieracium angustisquamum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and eye problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium angustisquamum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting the eyes from damage. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to apply directly to affected areas.
